Box Office & Sales Coordinator – 2023-2024
Infinithéâtre is accepting applications for the position of Box Office & Sales Coordinator for their 2023-2024 Season.

This position is a 32-week contract, 40/hr per week, at a pay of $18/hr, from October 2nd, 2023 to May 10th, 2024. Hours are somewhat flexible, and will not always conform to a standard 9 to 5 schedule, especially during performance weeks. 

The full job description for the Box Office & Sales Coordinator can be found HERE.

Applications will be accepted until September 8th, 2023 or until the position is filled.

Please submit CV and Cover Letter to jobs@infinitheatre.com clearly indicating Box Office Job Application in the subject line.

Assistant Technical Director (ATD) - 2023/24
Infinithéâtre is accepting applications for the position of Assistant Technical Director for their 2023-2024 Season.

This position is a 32-week contract, 40/hr per week, at a pay of $18/hr, from October 2nd, 2023 to May 10th, 2024. Hours are somewhat flexible, and will not conform to a standard 9 to 5 schedule, especially during setup, strike and performance weeks.

The full job description for the Assistant Technical Director can be found HERE

Applications will be accepted until September 8th, 2023 or until the position is filled.

Please submit CV and Cover Letter to jobs@infinitheatre.com clearly indicating ATD Job Application in the subject line.
